output.create_table_sql:
CREATE TRANSIENT TABLE IF NOT EXISTS DW.STAGING.STG_PARTNER_COMMISSION (
    COMMISSION_ID NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL,
    PARTNER_ID NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL,
    TRANSACTION_ID NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL,
    COMMISSION_AMOUNT NUMBER(18,2) NOT NULL,
    COMMISSION_RATE NUMBER(5,4) NOT NULL,
    CURRENCY_CODE VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
    COMMISSION_TYPE VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    STATUS VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    CREATED_DATE TIMESTAMP_NTZ NOT NULL,
    MODIFIED_DATE TIMESTAMP_NTZ,
    _LOADED_AT TIMESTAMP_NTZ DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),
    _SOURCE VARCHAR DEFAULT 'ECOMM'
);

decision_log.decision: Designed staging table STG_PARTNER_COMMISSION with type mappings
decision_log.rationale: Applied sf_type_mapping: BIGINT->NUMBER(38,0), INT->NUMBER(10,0), DATETIME->TIMESTAMP_NTZ. CamelCase->UPPER_SNAKE. Added _LOADED_AT and _SOURCE metadata columns. TRANSIENT for cost savings.

alternatives_considered.reason: TRANSIENT preferred for staging — no failsafe bytes, cheaper
